label: Acetylcholine modulation
definition: Modulates acetylcholine signaling through receptors, synthesis, release, or degradation.

label: Adaptogenic
definition: Supports stress adaptation through non-specific neuroendocrine or resilience-related pathways.

label: Adenosine modulation
definition: Modulates adenosine receptor signaling or adenosine-linked arousal pathways.

label: Adrenergic modulation
definition: Modulates alpha or beta adrenergic receptor signaling.

label: AMPK activation
definition: Activates AMPK signaling involved in cellular energy balance.

label: Androgen modulation
definition: Modulates androgen signaling, androgen receptor activity, or androgen-linked pathways.

label: Anti-inflammatory
definition: Reduces inflammatory signaling, mediators, or downstream inflammatory burden through one or more pathways.

label: Antioxidant
definition: Reduces oxidative stress directly or indirectly through radical scavenging or endogenous antioxidant defenses.

label: Anxiolytic
definition: Associated with reduced anxious arousal or calming effects in educational context.

label: Autophagy modulation
definition: Modulates autophagy or cellular degradation/recycling pathways.

label: BDNF modulation
definition: Modulates brain-derived neurotrophic factor or neurotrophic signaling.

label: Calcium-channel modulation
definition: Modulates calcium channel activity.

label: Cellular protection
definition: Broad protection of cellular integrity or resilience without specifying a single pathway.

label: Cholinesterase inhibition
definition: Inhibits acetylcholine breakdown enzymes such as acetylcholinesterase or butyrylcholinesterase.

label: COMT modulation
definition: Modulates catechol-O-methyltransferase activity or catecholamine metabolism.

label: Cortisol modulation
definition: Modulates cortisol-related signaling, secretion patterns, or stress hormone response.

label: COX inhibition
definition: Inhibits cyclooxygenase enzymes involved in prostaglandin synthesis.

label: Cytokine modulation
definition: Modulates cytokine production, signaling, or inflammatory messenger balance.

label: Dopamine modulation
definition: Modulates dopamine signaling, dopamine-linked receptors, dopamine precursors, release, reuptake, or turnover.

label: Endocannabinoid modulation
definition: Modulates endocannabinoid tone, cannabinoid receptor signaling, or related lipid signaling.

label: Estrogen receptor modulation
definition: Modulates estrogen receptor signaling or estrogen-linked pathways.

label: GABA modulation
definition: Modulates gamma-aminobutyric acid signaling or receptor activity.

label: Glucose regulation
definition: Modulates glucose handling, glycemic response, insulin sensitivity, or glucose uptake.

label: Glucose uptake modulation
definition: Modulates cellular glucose uptake or GLUT transporter activity.

label: Glutamate modulation
definition: Modulates glutamate signaling, NMDA/AMPA receptor activity, or excitatory neurotransmission.

label: Gut microbiome modulation
definition: Modulates gut microbial composition, activity, metabolites, or microbial ecology.

label: Histamine modulation
definition: Modulates histamine receptor signaling or histamine-linked responses.

label: Hormonal signaling context
definition: Broad endocrine or hormonal signaling context where a specific receptor or axis is not yet supported.

label: HPA-axis modulation
definition: Modulates hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal axis signaling or stress-hormone response patterns.

label: Immune modulation
definition: Modulates immune signaling or immune response patterns.

label: Insulin sensitivity modulation
definition: Modulates insulin signaling or insulin sensitivity.

label: Lipid metabolism support
definition: Modulates lipid handling, lipid transport, or cholesterol/triglyceride-related metabolic context.

label: LOX inhibition
definition: Inhibits lipoxygenase enzymes or leukotriene-linked inflammatory signaling.

label: MAO inhibition
definition: Inhibits monoamine oxidase enzymes involved in monoamine neurotransmitter metabolism.

label: Mast-cell stabilization
definition: Modulates mast-cell activation or degranulation.

label: Melatonin/circadian modulation
definition: Modulates melatonin signaling or circadian timing pathways.

label: Metabolic regulation
definition: Broad modulation of metabolic signaling, energy handling, or nutrient processing when a more specific pathway is not established.

label: Mitochondrial biogenesis
definition: Supports mitochondrial biogenesis or mitochondrial functional capacity.

label: mTOR modulation
definition: Modulates mTOR signaling involved in growth, nutrient sensing, and cellular metabolism.

label: Neuroprotective activity
definition: Broad protection or support of neural tissue or neuronal resilience, usually requiring cautious evidence framing.

label: NF-kB inhibition
definition: Downregulates nuclear factor kappa B signaling or related pro-inflammatory transcription.

label: Nitric oxide modulation
definition: Modulates nitric oxide signaling or endothelial vasodilation pathways.

label: Nrf2 activation
definition: Activates Nrf2-linked antioxidant response signaling.

label: Opioid receptor modulation
definition: Modulates opioid receptor signaling or endogenous opioid pathways.

label: Orexin modulation
definition: Modulates orexin/hypocretin-linked arousal and wakefulness signaling.

label: PDE inhibition
definition: Inhibits phosphodiesterase enzymes involved in cyclic nucleotide signaling.

label: Potassium-channel modulation
definition: Modulates potassium channel activity.

label: PPAR activation
definition: Activates or modulates peroxisome proliferator-activated receptor signaling.

label: Serotonin modulation
definition: Modulates serotonin signaling, serotonin receptors, serotonin turnover, or serotonin-linked pathways.

label: Sodium-channel modulation
definition: Modulates sodium channel activity.

label: Thyroid-axis modulation
definition: Modulates thyroid hormone pathways or thyroid-axis signaling.

label: TRPV1 modulation
definition: Modulates transient receptor potential vanilloid 1 signaling.

label: Vascular function support
definition: Broad support for vascular tone, circulation, endothelial signaling, or blood-flow related physiology.
